title: Fix real tracker gate lifecycle and durable dashboard actions
description: Correct real tk checkpoint semantics and fake fixture; bind human evidence provenance without relying on transient verdict. Make dashboard note/approve/reject tracker mutations commit durably. Handle --requires close transitions without throwing into dirty partial state: persist awaiting transaction, stop dependents, and resume after approval. Add real-shape/outside-in tests.
notes: 2026-07-15 13:10 - Dispatched by Pi orchestrator on tick/qfs/zlm with openai-codex/gpt-5.6-sol:high; child must not modify .tick/**.
acceptance_criteria: A real checkpoint approval with human-bound evidence resumes exactly once; dashboard actions leave clean committed tracker state; --requires gates pause durably and resume without closing early or dirtying the checkout; tests pass.
